## Market Intelligence Summary

**Why this week matters:**
- **33 days to hurricane season** (June 1) — the pre-season partnership window is closing
- **April rainfall 3x normal** — water/mold firms are booked and dealing with active coverage disputes
- **SB 808 goes live July 1** — roofer frustration building over inspection quality; PA dispute playbook is the pitch
- **Palm Beach civil filings surging** — attorneys are active; PA referral lane opening
- **1.3M depopulated policies** heading into first hurricane season with new carriers — agents and PMs need PA backup

**Urgency tiers:**
- 🔴 **Act this week:** Water mitigation (active disputes NOW), All Phase (active expansion)
- 🟠 **Act in 7–10 days:** HOA/property managers (pre-season partnership window), attorneys
- 🟡 **Build by end of May:** Insurance agents (webinar co-host angle before June 1)
